Through original programming, documentaries, and expert-led discussions, MHTN aims to increase awareness, provide valuable information, and encourage open conversations about mental well-being.

programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Hope and Health With Mathew Embry
programme.desc: Louise Zylstra was a professional golfer when she was diagnosed with multiple sclerosis, and she responded the only way she knew how: by pushing harder. She trained for hours a day trying to overpower MS, only to drive her body into severe inflammation and neurological symptoms that left her barely able to walk. In this episode, Mathew Embry speaks with Louise about searching for answers beyond her initial prognosis. She shares how she pursued treatments overseas.

programme.title: To Catch a Thief
programme.desc: Notorious cat burglar John Robie (Cary Grant) has long since retired to tend vineyards on the French Riviera. When a series of robberies is committed in his style, John must clear his name. Armed with a list of people who own the most expensive jewels currently in the area, John begins following the first owner, young Francie (Grace Kelly). When her jewels are stolen, Francie suspects John, destroying their tentative romance. John goes on the lam to catch the thief and clear his own name.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
Face of a Fugitive
programme.desc: While being escorted to jail, bank robber Jim Larson (Fred MacMurray) manages to get the upper hand on his captor and escape. Jim is surprised to see his brother appear on the scene, ready to aid his sibling. As they make their getaway, his brother and the pursuing lawman shoot each other, leaving the stunned Jim alone and on the run. Assuming a different identity, Jim travels to a mining town and befriends the local sheriff (Lin McCarthy), hoping to start over and find redemption.

programme.title: Raton Pass
programme.desc: Homesteaders help a husband (Dennis Morgan) fight his wife (Patricia Neal) and her gunman (Steve Cochran) for their New Mexico ranch.

programme.title: Face of a Fugitive
programme.desc: While being escorted to jail, bank robber Jim Larson (Fred MacMurray) manages to get the upper hand on his captor and escape. Jim is surprised to see his brother appear on the scene, ready to aid his sibling. As they make their getaway, his brother and the pursuing lawman shoot each other, leaving the stunned Jim alone and on the run. Assuming a different identity, Jim travels to a mining town and befriends the local sheriff (Lin McCarthy), hoping to start over and find redemption.

programme.title: Annie Get Your Gun
programme.desc: The musical tale of Annie Oakley (Betty Hutton) moves from stage to screen in this rollicking film adaptation. Renowned in the Wild West as a sharpshooter, Annie meets her match, both romantically and professionally, in the form of fellow ace gunslinger Frank Butler (Howard Keel). While Annie and Frank are performing as part of the famous traveling show headlined by the legendary Buffalo Bill (Louis Calhern), the two compete and flirt, with plenty of ups and downs along the way.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: In Frank Capra's acclaimed romantic comedy, spoiled heiress Ellie Andrews (Claudette Colbert) impetuously marries the scheming King Westley, leading her tycoon father (Walter Connolly) to spirit her away on his yacht. After jumping ship, Ellie falls in with cynical newspaper reporter Peter Warne (Clark Gable), who offers to help her reunite with her new husband in exchange for an exclusive story. But during their travels, the reporter finds himself falling for the feisty young heiress.

programme.title: Oliver!
programme.desc: In this award-winning adaptation of the Broadway musical based on the Charles Dickens novel, 9-year-old orphan Oliver Twist (Mark Lester) falls in with a group of street-urchin pickpockets led by the Artful Dodger (Jack Wild) and masterminded by the criminal Fagin (Ron Moody). When Oliver's intended mark, Mr. Brownlow (Joseph O'Conor), takes pity on the lad and offers him a home, Fagin's henchman Bill Sikes (Oliver Reed) plots to kidnap the boy to keep him from talking.

programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Learning about Brigham Young's settlement of the Utah territory; then we dig in the dirt to find hundreds of perfectly preserved dinosaurs at the Utah Natural History museum; a look at some US aviation history at the Hill Air force Base museum.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: St. Thomas; St. Lucia; Grenada.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Jeff and RJ love to entertain so Douglas Elleman's Tara West shows them a mansion in the sky; empty nesters John and Debra are looking to start the next phase of their lives in the prestigious Dallas neighborhood of Highland Park.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: In California, restaurateur Jen looks at three amazing homes in upscale neighborhoods in West Lake and Ventura counties.

programme.title: 5 Star Getaways
programme.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5 star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programme.title: Life on the Road
programme.desc: Inside the growing movement of people living in their vans and traveling the country. Host Alec Parent tours a luxury Mercedes Sprinter van conversion and shows how he built his own DIY camper van.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Tropical beaches and volcanoes.

programme.title: The 77 Percent Corruption and civil engagement
programme.desc: From a bribe demanded on the streets of Kinshasa to families in Kenya paying the price for broken systems, young Africans are questioning who truly benefits — and who pays. programme.title: Tomorrow Today How stress makes your mind go blank — the science behind it
programme.desc: Why stress hormones can trigger sudden ‘brain freeze’ in interviews, exams or live broadcasts - and what you can do about it. Also: smart textiles, building with popcorn, a tool-using cow and vital aquatic fungi.

programme.title: From Surplus Calf to Alpine Savior
programme.desc: For a cow to produce milk, she must give birth to a calf. Female calves later become dairy cows themselves, while male calves are surplus to the dairy industry’s requirements. They’re packed into trucks and suffer in transit on their way to fattening facilities.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After being framed for the Puppy Co. leak, a fugitive Boss Baby goes on the lam and comes face to face with an old corporate rival.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Ever wonder what it's like to grow up in a big family? Eleven-year-old Lincoln Loud gives viewers an inside look at how to survive the chaos of a huge household, especially as the only boy with ten sisters!

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When Lily and Jack must sacrifice their own summer plans, it kicks off a new, chaotic normal, starting with a runaway trailer that each insists on saving their own way.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: When monsters want to get away from it all, they go to Count Dracula's (Adam Sandler) Hotel Transylvania, a lavish resort where they can be themselves without humans around to bother them. On one special weekend, Dracula invites creatures like the Invisible Man, the Mummy and others to celebrate the 118th birthday of his daughter, Mavis (Selena Gomez). However, an unforeseen complication unfolds when an ordinary human unwittingly crashes the party and falls in love with Mavis.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The world needed a hero and it got a hedgehog. Powered with incredible speed, Sonic races across the globe to stop uncool evil genius Dr. Robotnik from achieving world domination.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Can-do koala Buster Moon and his all-star cast of animal performers prepare to launch a dazzling stage extravaganza in the glittering entertainment capital of the world. There's just one hitch, he has to find and persuade the world's most reclusive rock star to join them. What begins as Buster's dream of big-time success soon becomes an emotional reminder of the power of music to heal even the most broken heart.

programme.title: Think Big
programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: Biz Kids
programme.desc: Teaching financial education and entrepreneurship to a preteen audience; using sketch comedy and young actors to explain basic economic concepts.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

programme.title: Hellgate
programme.desc: After the Civil War, ranch owner Gil Hanley helps a stranger in desperate need of medical attention. Soon he is questioned by Union soldiers about the stranger, who turns out to be an ex-Confederate soldier. Hanley, also an ex-Confederate, is unjustly convicted as a conspirator and sentenced to life in a brutal desert prison in New Mexico. After battling his tough cellmate and a sadistic guard, Hanley tries to stop a plague from overwhelming the prison.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Luxury shopping in Istanbul; win in Loire Valley.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S1 E3 The Spanish Grant The Cartwrights are in a battle over the validity of a Spanish land grant. They plan to stop the De La Cuesta family from seizing part of the Ponderosa along with all of the Carson Valley settlers' homestead lands.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train carrying Japanese diplomats. The gang takes an ornate Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. president. Now, a gunman and samurai must lay their differences aside and work together to recover the priceless gift.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S5 E18 Hostages to Fortune On Halloween, Mark and his friends wear masks and go from ranch to ranch to play pranks. Knowing the boys will be blamed, rustlers wear similar masks to steal cattle. Lucas thinks the boys are mixed up in the theft, until he finds out the truth.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S2 E4 Bulls on the Beach While the cowboys are sorting the herd, Cody suffers a close call on the job that sets off a string of bad luck as he plans his annual rodeo, Bulls on the Beach. He struggles to impress a potential sponsor and the entire event is put in jeopardy when the bulls don't arrive as scheduled. Bubba heads to Mississippi to work for his father-in-law and try his hand at office life. Booger and Jaclyn enjoy learning the first dance for their wedding, but Booger finds himself awkwardly out of place as the only man at their bridal shower!

programme.title: War of the Wildcats
programme.desc: During the early days of the Oklahoma oil boom, a greedy, self-assured oilman and a quiet, yet determined cowboy fight for the rights to oil on Indian land. All the while a pretty schoolteacher steals both men's hearts.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S1 E10 San Francisco Ben, Hoss and Joe decide to visit San Francisco with some of their ranch hands. The hands vanish into the crowds and while searching for them, Ben finds himself shanghaied and on a ship destined for Hong Kong.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S1 E11 Bitter Water When miner Lem Keith plans to buy land next to the Ponderosa, he goes to the owner's son, Todd, who is willing to help Lem because he is in love with Lem's daughter. Plus, they both share a common hatred of the Cartwrights.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S1 E3 Jim Beckwourth: War Chief of the Crow When former slave Jim Beckwourth heads west to seek work as a trapper, he begins what will become one of the most eventful, heroic lives of all the mountain men. As a joke, one of Beckwourth's fellow trappers tells a group of Crow warriors that Beckwourth is a long-lost member of their tribe, and the adventure begins. Adopted by the Crow, Beckwourth joins them in a series of ferocious battles with other tribes, becomes a war chief, and falls in love with a fierce female warrior named Pine Leaf. He then uses his hard-won influence with the Crow to convince them to provide furs to the powerful American Fur Company. But an unexpected visit from legendary trapper and old friend Tom Fitzpatrick sets off a violent collision that forces Beckwourth to choose between the two worlds he loves.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S4 E10 Willie Kennard Makes His Mark in History Under siege by gunslingers, the gold mining town of Yankee Hill runs a newspaper advertisement to find a new marshal. Former slave and Union soldier Willie Kennard answers the ad, but he faces prejudice and doubt as he works to restore law and order.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S1 E13 Stagecoach Mary While working as a groundskeeper at a convent in Ohio, former slave Mary Fields forms a deep friendship with the superior, Mother Amadeus Dunne. When Mother Amadeus falls ill after traveling to Montana to open a girls' school, Mary rushes to her rescue and nurses her back to health. Mary soon discovers that the Western Frontier satisfies her free-spirited nature, and she decides to stay in Montana for good. She secures a contract to deliver mail by stagecoach for the U.S. Postal Service, becoming the first African American woman to carry mail. With a fearless attitude and multiple firearms, she protects the mail from would-be bandits and is soon known far and wide. Some years later, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman Bat Masterson meets Sister Amadeus and gets the true story of Stagecoach Mary.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E6 On the Hunt Looking for a distraction from his tasks at Elkhorn Ranch, Theodore Roosevelt decides a hunting expedition to the Bighorn Mountains of Wyoming might just settle his mind, but he soon finds himself face to face with a man-eating grizzly bear.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E25 One Went to Denver Tom Birch, an old childhood friend, comes to visit Lucas unexpectedly. Birch promises he is just passing through on his way to Denver. But Lucas soon finds out about a plot to rob the North Fork Bank and must choose between friendship and justice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E26 The Deadly Wait Just released from prison, Dan Maury comes to North Fork in search of Marshal Micah Torrance, who helped get him locked up. Torrance carries a shotgun everywhere he goes, but Maury plans to wait him out.

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: In 1866, the Reno Brothers gang is ravaging Indiana. When a detective agency sends a man to infiltrate the gang by posing as an outlaw, he sets a trap to capture the gang during an early-morning train robbery.

programme.title: Black Fox: The Price of Peace
programme.desc: A Texas woman falls in love with a Kiowa brave, and chooses to remain with him rather than return to her demanding and abusive husband. Driven by bitterness and rage, the husband soon forms a hunting party set on recapturing his bride, at any price.

programme.title: War of the Wildcats
programme.desc: During the early days of the Oklahoma oil boom, a greedy, self-assured oilman and a quiet, yet determined cowboy fight for the rights to oil on Indian land. All the while a pretty schoolteacher steals both men's hearts.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E25 One Went to Denver Tom Birch, an old childhood friend, comes to visit Lucas unexpectedly. Birch promises he is just passing through on his way to Denver. But Lucas soon finds out about a plot to rob the North Fork Bank and must choose between friendship and justice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E26 The Deadly Wait Just released from prison, Dan Maury comes to North Fork in search of Marshal Micah Torrance, who helped get him locked up. Torrance carries a shotgun everywhere he goes, but Maury plans to wait him out.

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: In 1866, the Reno Brothers gang is ravaging Indiana. When a detective agency sends a man to infiltrate the gang by posing as an outlaw, he sets a trap to capture the gang during an early-morning train robbery.

programme.title: Black Fox: The Price of Peace
programme.desc: A Texas woman falls in love with a Kiowa brave, and chooses to remain with him rather than return to her demanding and abusive husband. Driven by bitterness and rage, the husband soon forms a hunting party set on recapturing his bride, at any price.

programme.title: Far Haven
programme.desc: In 1887, Hunter Braddock moves back to Far Haven, Arizona to start over with his two young children, but when his father-in-law is brutally attacked he must take on the corrupt forces strangling the town in order to protect what he loves most.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S2 E14 Survival of the Fittest An army captain arrives at Fort Courage and tells Captain Permenter that two troops must undergo a survival test in the wilderness. Parmenter decides to go with Agarn. Realizing they must survive on their own, the two face challenges finding food.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S2 E15 Bring on the Dancing Girls A new saloon owner named Dan Lawson takes over O'Rourke and Agarn's business. He quickly raises prices and adds a cover charge, angering the regular patrons. Lawson adds new entertainment with dancing can-can girls creating quite the spectacle.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: A cattle baron awaits the return of his daughter from school and is surprised that his wife has returned to take their daughter away. He tries to keep the peace and do what is best for everyone.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E8 Ordeal Lucas and Mark travel through the desert to get a supply of salt when a rattlesnake spooks their horses, causing the wagon to overturn. A horse must be put down due to injury and Lucas is also badly hurt. Mark has no choice but to go for help alone.

programme.title: Streets of Laredo
programme.desc: S1 E1 Part 1 Retired Texas Ranger Captain Woodrow Call is asked to track down and capture a crafty long-distance killer who uses a buffalo gun and quickly disappears into the countryside. Texas railroad expansion can't move forward until this shooter is stopped!

programme.title: Streets of Laredo
programme.desc: S1 E2 Part 2 Captain Call learns he has more than just teenage, long-distance killer Joey Garza to hunt down, he must also bring the depraved outlaw Mox Mox and his gang to justice.

programme.title: Streets of Laredo
programme.desc: S1 E3 Part 3 While the posse continues their mission to capture or kill Joey Garza, Captain Call breaks off from his men to pursue Mox Mox. Meanwhile, Lorena searches for Pea and Joey's mother while Maria tries to help her murderous son elude the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E16 The Sheridan Story At the end of the Civil War, General Sheridan and his staff arrive at the McCain Ranch. Trouble begins when ex-confederate soldier and hired hand Frank Blandon confronts the general, who shot and wounded him in the war.

programme.title: Far Haven
programme.desc: In 1887, Hunter Braddock moves back to Far Haven, Arizona to start over with his two young children, but when his father-in-law is brutally attacked he must take on the corrupt forces strangling the town in order to protect what he loves most.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S2 E10 Miss Parmenter Captain Wilton Parmenter's equally clumsy sister, Daphne, visits Fort Courage. She is on a mission to find a husband and soon sets her sights on Dobbs the bugler. In the process, she creates havoc for the F Troop while attempting to marry Dobbs.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S2 E11 La Dolce Courage An Italian man, Emilio Barberini, and his beautiful daughter, Gina, visit the F Troop at Fort Courage. Her beauty attracts the attention of every man, but her hot-headed suitor is pursuing her and swears vengeance on anyone who even glances her way.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: A cattle baron awaits the return of his daughter from school and is surprised that his wife has returned to take their daughter away. He tries to keep the peace and do what is best for everyone.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E8 Ordeal Lucas and Mark travel through the desert to get a supply of salt when a rattlesnake spooks their horses, causing the wagon to overturn. A horse must be put down due to injury and Lucas is also badly hurt. Mark has no choice but to go for help alone.

programme.title: Streets of Laredo
programme.desc: S1 E1 Part 1 Retired Texas Ranger Captain Woodrow Call is asked to track down and capture a crafty long-distance killer who uses a buffalo gun and quickly disappears into the countryside. Texas railroad expansion can't move forward until this shooter is stopped!

programme.title: Streets of Laredo
programme.desc: S1 E2 Part 2 Captain Call learns he has more than just teenage, long-distance killer Joey Garza to hunt down, he must also bring the depraved outlaw Mox Mox and his gang to justice.

programme.title: Streets of Laredo
programme.desc: S1 E3 Part 3 While the posse continues their mission to capture or kill Joey Garza, Captain Call breaks off from his men to pursue Mox Mox. Meanwhile, Lorena searches for Pea and Joey's mother while Maria tries to help her murderous son elude the law.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S7 E11 Let It Ripp The cowboys are busy processing cattle and preparing for an important shipment when a chute gets stuck, bringing work to a halt and risking time and money they can't afford to lose. Booger trains a cutting horse and enters it into its first competition. Cody organizes a campout for the youth at the Alabama Sheriff's Boys Ranch, and the guys share some of their cowboy wisdom with the hope of inspiring another generation to follow the cowboy way. Friends and family gather for a baby shower, where Bubba and Kaley reveal the name they've chosen for their new addition.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S7 E12 Final Cow Down, The During a long drought in lower Alabama, the cowboys have been chasing green grass throughout the surrounding area. Through new partnerships with other ranchers, they've finally ended up with a bumper crop of calves in north Alabama and a healthy herd in south Florida. Cody and Misty seek out the perfect high-value bull to build their growing cattle business, and they watch as their dream home finally takes shape. Bubba and Kaley welcome baby Ripp Walker Thompson into the world. Booger and Jaclyn surprise Grandma with a cowboy cookbook filled with her recipes and stories from life on the range.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E18 The Visitor A pretty young widow named Ann Dodd passes through North Fork on her way to claim her inheritance. She and Lucas are immediately attracted to each other, but danger awaits as other heirs try to take Ann's life to get the inheritance for themselves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E19 Hero While hunting, Colly Vane encounters a dangerous outlaw, The Domino Kid, who forces Vane to shoot him. When he brings the body back to town, it's discovered he was shot in the back. Instead of being a hero, Vane faces danger.

programme.title: The Legend of 5 Mile Cave
programme.desc: A boy enchanted with tales from the Old West unlocks a mystery that could save their family farm. While his widowed mother struggles to avoid foreclosure, a mysterious stranger arrives looking for a room to rent. A bond with the boy grows as the drifter recounts breathtaking stories of Shooter Green, a legendary gunslinger accused of Arizona's biggest gold robbery. The truth is revealed, along with the secret of the drifter's past when a crooked lawman appears, hot on the trail of the stolen gold. Past and present collide in this tale of action, adventure and drama. Stars Adam Baldwin (The Last Ship, Full Metal Jacket, The Patriot), Jeremy Sumpter (Peter Pan, Soul Surfer), Jill Wagner (Braven, Christmas Cookies), and Jet Jurgensmeyer (Last Man Standing, American Sniper).

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: When two brothers each decide to fight on opposite sides in the Civil War, they never dreamed they would need to reunite and fight together. It is the only chance they have, if they hope to survive a brutal Indian attack.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S4 E10 Alibi for the Scalped Man Cheyenne travels to Emmetville for his friend's wedding. When he arrives in town, he finds out that his friend is missing. Suspicious arise around the tight-lipped Emmet family and the bride-to-be who doesn't seemed concerned of his whereabouts.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E7 Bandits When a masked bandit terrorizes the stagecoach line, killing a passenger, Theodore Roosevelt and his Elkhorn men join the citizens of Medora to track down the culprit. Can they lay a trap to catch the killer before he strikes again?

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E8 Crossroads After a wildfire rages through Elkhorn Ranch, Theodore Roosevelt is forced to sell some livestock before the fall roundup. But Roosevelt's pride prevents him from accepting a low offer from the town's founder, triggering a violent chain of events.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E23 The Grasshopper When Lucas and Mark go on a train trip, clouds of swarming grasshoppers force the train to stop. A prisoner takes advantage of the emergency and breaks free, then kills Marshal Dixon. Lucas, with the help of a buffalo hunter, outwits the outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E24 A Time for Singing Outlaws kill a preacher and his wife. Two members of the group assume their identity and come to North Fork to rob the bank. However, when Mark finds out who they really are, he is kidnapped and kept quiet. Lucas and Micah set out to stop the gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E25 The Deserter A wounded Army deserter shows up at the McCain Ranch desperate for a horse. Lucas takes him in just as the Army Cavalry unit appears to take the deserter into custody. In town, the harsh commanding officer demands he be executed for desertion.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E26 The Vision Mark drinks some tainted water from a barrel and contracts typhoid fever. Lucas is forced to use an eccentric old doctor. During bouts of a continuous intense fever, Mark becomes delirious and has a vision of his deceased mother, who he never knew.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S7 E11 Let It Ripp The cowboys are busy processing cattle and preparing for an important shipment when a chute gets stuck, bringing work to a halt and risking time and money they can't afford to lose. Booger trains a cutting horse and enters it into its first competition. Cody organizes a campout for the youth at the Alabama Sheriff's Boys Ranch, and the guys share some of their cowboy wisdom with the hope of inspiring another generation to follow the cowboy way. Friends and family gather for a baby shower, where Bubba and Kaley reveal the name they've chosen for their new addition.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S7 E12 Final Cow Down, The During a long drought in lower Alabama, the cowboys have been chasing green grass throughout the surrounding area. Through new partnerships with other ranchers, they've finally ended up with a bumper crop of calves in north Alabama and a healthy herd in south Florida. Cody and Misty seek out the perfect high-value bull to build their growing cattle business, and they watch as their dream home finally takes shape. Bubba and Kaley welcome baby Ripp Walker Thompson into the world. Booger and Jaclyn surprise Grandma with a cowboy cookbook filled with her recipes and stories from life on the range.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E18 The Visitor A pretty young widow named Ann Dodd passes through North Fork on her way to claim her inheritance. She and Lucas are immediately attracted to each other, but danger awaits as other heirs try to take Ann's life to get the inheritance for themselves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E19 Hero While hunting, Colly Vane encounters a dangerous outlaw, The Domino Kid, who forces Vane to shoot him. When he brings the body back to town, it's discovered he was shot in the back. Instead of being a hero, Vane faces danger.

programme.title: The Legend of 5 Mile Cave
programme.desc: A boy enchanted with tales from the Old West unlocks a mystery that could save their family farm. While his widowed mother struggles to avoid foreclosure, a mysterious stranger arrives looking for a room to rent. A bond with the boy grows as the drifter recounts breathtaking stories of Shooter Green, a legendary gunslinger accused of Arizona's biggest gold robbery. The truth is revealed, along with the secret of the drifter's past when a crooked lawman appears, hot on the trail of the stolen gold. Past and present collide in this tale of action, adventure and drama. Stars Adam Baldwin (The Last Ship, Full Metal Jacket, The Patriot), Jeremy Sumpter (Peter Pan, Soul Surfer), Jill Wagner (Braven, Christmas Cookies), and Jet Jurgensmeyer (Last Man Standing, American Sniper).

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: When two brothers each decide to fight on opposite sides in the Civil War, they never dreamed they would need to reunite and fight together. It is the only chance they have, if they hope to survive a brutal Indian attack.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S4 E10 Alibi for the Scalped Man Cheyenne travels to Emmetville for his friend's wedding. When he arrives in town, he finds out that his friend is missing. Suspicious arise around the tight-lipped Emmet family and the bride-to-be who doesn't seemed concerned of his whereabouts.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E7 Bandits When a masked bandit terrorizes the stagecoach line, killing a passenger, Theodore Roosevelt and his Elkhorn men join the citizens of Medora to track down the culprit. Can they lay a trap to catch the killer before he strikes again?

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E8 Crossroads After a wildfire rages through Elkhorn Ranch, Theodore Roosevelt is forced to sell some livestock before the fall roundup. But Roosevelt's pride prevents him from accepting a low offer from the town's founder, triggering a violent chain of events.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E31 The Angry Man A neighboring rancher's son is seriously injured in an accident. With the young man's condition getting worse, Lucas learns the rancher won't take his son to the doctor since he feels his wife died from poor treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E32 The Woman The residents force Miss Adams, the North Fork schoolteacher, to leave her job because they feel she is too progressive for supporting women's right to vote. Lucas gets involved and he learns that lies have been circulated by a past student.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E33 The Money Gun Lucas has a disdain for Oat Jackford since years ago he burned down his ranch to get him off property he wanted. When hired killer Tom King arrives in North Fork and is on Oat's trail, Lucas decides to side with and help the man he once hated.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E34 A Matter of Faith A trail bum rides into North Fork during one of the worst droughts in years. He claims that he can bring rain to their town. Many believe that he's a water witcher, but a railroad boss resents his intrusion and wants him gone.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S1 E1 Bubba, Cody and Booger It's another busy week in South Alabama for cowboys Bubba, Cody, and Booger. Rancher and expert carpenter Bubba Thompson races to build furniture and prepare his house for his soon-to-be wife, Kaley. Rodeo champion and cattle dealer Cody Harris is struggling to carry on after selling his prized rodeo horse in order to buy a home with his new wife, Misty. And, expert cattleman and horse trainer Booger Brown gets a life changing job offer he must consider. Despite their own worries, Booger and Bubba pitch in to buy a new colt for Cody in order to lift his spirits.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S1 E2 An American Tradition The cowboys of Faith Cattle Company risk their safety while separating a rogue bull from their herd before it breeds with their cattle. Newlyweds and expectant parents, Bubba and Kaley, get their home and lives ready for their baby girl. Retired calf-roper, Cody, must put on a successful rodeo or risk losing a vital source of income for his young family. Booger, the expert horse trainer, gets a call from a distressed neighbor about an unruly mare. Booger agrees to help tame the horse, but if he can't do it, the horse will be put down.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E20 The Horse Traders Kansas Sawyer is Lucas' friend who was cheated in a horse-trading deal. Lucas investigates Colonel Bourbon's operation and discovers his illegal process. He also learns that the horse Sawyer bought was stolen and is being sought after by outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E21 The Spoiler An elderly couple move to North Fork and settle down under a false name to keep the town from knowing they are parents of a vicious killer on the loose. However, their plan fails when their son shows up and causes chaos.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S1 E18 Wrongo Starr and the Lady in Black Captain Parmenter helps a jinxed soldier named Wrongo Starr who arrives at Fort Courage. Starr has a reputation for having bad luck. Meanwhile, another known jinx, Hermione Gooderly, a widow who had four husbands, arrives and has eyes for Agarn.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S1 E19 El Diablo The men of F Troop are undergoing their annual physicals when word arrives that Mexican bandit El Diablo is at large. El Diablo is Agarn's identical cousin, Pancho Agarnato. When Agarnato takes hostages, Agarn pursues him to clear his family's name.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S3 E12 Annie Oakley & Buffalo Bill's Wild West Showdown When Buffalo Bill adds female sharpshooter Lillian Smith to his Wild West show, it jeopardizes his relationship with the show's current star, Annie Oakley. As the rivalry between Annie and Lillian escalates, the future of the show is put at risk.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S4 E1 Bat Masterson Leaves the West After leaving Dodge City, Bat Masterson takes a job as manager of Denver's Palace Theatre. There he falls in love with Emma Walter, a jugging virtuoso known as the Queen of Clubs, and begins to question his life as a gunslinger.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S1 E1 They Killed Me Frontiersman Jim Bridger spins an incredible tale to a group of settlers, claiming he was once killed by Blackfeet warriors yet somehow lived to tell the tale. They think he's joking, but Bridger soon proves that he really did rise from the dead.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S1 E4 Brothers in Arms When they are ambushed by a Blackfeet war party, Jim Bridger and a lone Shoshone brave must work together to find a way to defeat their common enemy. If they can't overcome their suspicions and learn to trust each other, they may not survive the day.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S3 E20 The Debt A new rider named Matt trains to replace Lou when she gets married. However, when the new rider disappears on his first ride, Jimmy and Lou go after him. Jimmy soon discovers that the Garrett brothers are responsible for Matt's demise.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S6 E1 Winchester Quarantine Cheyenne meets a beautiful, feisty woman and helps her drive her herd of cattle to safety from a fever outbreak during a Texas quarantine. Despite her business struggles, he also finds himself falling in love with her.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S6 E2 Trouble Street When Cheyenne rides into a town, the deputy quickly arrests him for no apparent reason. He discovers that the corrupt deputy arrests others passing through town and forces them to work at a local mine.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S2 E5 The Hopefuls Jacob Darien is leading his family through Virginia City when they are accosted. Adam Cartwright and his new traveling companion, Sam Bord, step in to help. Adam offers to escort them, unaware that Sam is planning a robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E27 The Lariat Lariat Jones, an old friend of Lucas', comes to North Fork to open up a new gambling casino. Jones has an excellent reputation as an honest gambler. But when two strangers become his partners, accusations of cheating become deadly for Jones.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E28 Smoke Screen A beautiful headstrong young woman named Marge Crandell doesn't like to be told what to do by anyone. Several men vie for her attention and when Lucas finds her dead, one of the men becomes a prime suspect due to a simple clue, a half-smoked cigar.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E29 Shotgun Man Lucas receives several mysterious threatening notes. He discovers they are being sent from ex-convict, John Beaumont, who is bent on revenge. Beaumont wants Lucas dead since he is the one responsible for his imprisonment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E30 Sins of the Father Andy Moon and his young son, Bobby, take shelter at the McCain Ranch. Andy killed a man in a gunfight in self-defense. Now, the man's brothers are after Moon. Complications arise when Bobby discovers the truth about their running from town to town.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S2 E7 All for One or One for Himself Booger and Jaclyn enjoy a romantic beach getaway for their honeymoon and discuss their new life together. Misty and Cody contemplate a business partnership. To celebrate their anniversary, Bubba and Kaley take a trip to Mississippi, and Bubba begins to warm up to the idea of relocating there permanently to work with Kaley's father. However, Bubba's reluctance to tell Booger and Cody about the job offer from his father-in-law causes tensions to boil over, leaving the future of their business, and their friendship, uncertain.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S2 E8 Happy Trails Booger and Cody struggle to pen two bulls in need of a veterinary check-up. Cody gets soaked when he fails to heed Booger's prediction of a rainstorm, sparking Booger to try his hand at delivering the local weather forecast. Bubba decides to accept the job with his father-in-law in Mississippi and he makes a handmade gift for Cody and Booger to soften the blow when he breaks the news to them. The trio takes on one last big job to benefit a neighbor in need. Bubba and Kaley host a final cookout before they pack up and leave for Mississippi.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S3 E4 The Pitchman A fast-talking con man and his teenage son stop at Lucas McCain's Ranch and try to talk their way into securing the mineral rights. However, the plan backfires when they discover the gold they thought was on the property is actually fool's gold.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S3 E5 Strange Town Prisoner Bletch Droshek escapes from Marshal Micah Torrance, and leaves him beaten on a barbed-wire fence. Torrance stumbles to the McCain Ranch and deputizes Lucas to apprehend Droshek at a mining camp run by his brother.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S1 E18 Wrongo Starr and the Lady in Black Captain Parmenter helps a jinxed soldier named Wrongo Starr who arrives at Fort Courage. Starr has a reputation for having bad luck. Meanwhile, another known jinx, Hermione Gooderly, a widow who had four husbands, arrives and has eyes for Agarn.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S1 E19 El Diablo The men of F Troop are undergoing their annual physicals when word arrives that Mexican bandit El Diablo is at large. El Diablo is Agarn's identical cousin, Pancho Agarnato. When Agarnato takes hostages, Agarn pursues him to clear his family's name.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S1 E4 The Legend of the Blue-Eyed Apache When eleven-year-old Herman Lehmann is torn away from his frontier home by an Apache raiding party, he must adapt in order to survive. He soon forgets the life he unwillingly left behind and is adopted by an Apache family. For close to a decade, he lives as a Native American, learning their language and customs. Eventually, he even joins the same type of raiding party that separated him from his family. Though the years pass by, Herman's mother never gives up hope that she will be reunited with her son. One day, she hears a rumor of a blue-eyed Apache now living on a reservation. Could this be her long-lost son? Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Herman's mother to uncover the real story of the blue-eyed Apache.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S1 E5 The Real Lone Star Ranger When young Texas Ranger Ira Aten is having trouble hunting down a ruthless outlaw, he enlists the help of John Hughes, an aloof rancher with an uncanny talent for tracking bad guys. The two men form an unlikely and unexpected bond while traversing the dusty path toward justice. With Hughes' guidance, Aten finally catches up to the outlaw and ends his reign of terror. Along the way, Hughes decides to become a Ranger himself and transforms from loner to lawman. Hughes' adventure with Aten is just the first chapter of a storied career that inspires the popular novel, The Lone Star Ranger. Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Aten years later to uncover the real story of the Lone Star Ranger and separate the truth from the fiction.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S1 E1 They Killed Me Frontiersman Jim Bridger spins an incredible tale to a group of settlers, claiming he was once killed by Blackfeet warriors yet somehow lived to tell the tale. They think he's joking, but Bridger soon proves that he really did rise from the dead.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S1 E4 Brothers in Arms When they are ambushed by a Blackfeet war party, Jim Bridger and a lone Shoshone brave must work together to find a way to defeat their common enemy. If they can't overcome their suspicions and learn to trust each other, they may not survive the day.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S3 E20 The Debt A new rider named Matt trains to replace Lou when she gets married. However, when the new rider disappears on his first ride, Jimmy and Lou go after him. Jimmy soon discovers that the Garrett brothers are responsible for Matt's demise.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S6 E1 Winchester Quarantine Cheyenne meets a beautiful, feisty woman and helps her drive her herd of cattle to safety from a fever outbreak during a Texas quarantine. Despite her business struggles, he also finds himself falling in love with her.

programme.desc: S2 E27 The Lariat Lariat Jones, an old friend of Lucas', comes to North Fork to open up a new gambling casino. Jones has an excellent reputation as an honest gambler. But when two strangers become his partners, accusations of cheating become deadly for Jones.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E28 Smoke Screen A beautiful headstrong young woman named Marge Crandell doesn't like to be told what to do by anyone. Several men vie for her attention and when Lucas finds her dead, one of the men becomes a prime suspect due to a simple clue, a half-smoked cigar.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E29 Shotgun Man Lucas receives several mysterious threatening notes. He discovers they are being sent from ex-convict, John Beaumont, who is bent on revenge. Beaumont wants Lucas dead since he is the one responsible for his imprisonment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E30 Sins of the Father Andy Moon and his young son, Bobby, take shelter at the McCain Ranch. Andy killed a man in a gunfight in self-defense. Now, the man's brothers are after Moon. Complications arise when Bobby discovers the truth about their running from town to town.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S3 E1 My Heart's in Alabama It's time for the cowboys to ride into new pastures as they explore growing their cattle business in unexpected ways. Bubba has been making good money working for his father-in-law's company in Mississippi, but he realizes he'd rather be out of his office chair and back on his horse in Alabama. Cody is excited to be managing a big rodeo, but a steer mishap puts the future of his contract on the ropes. And, even though Booger has happily saddled up with Jaclyn, it's unfamiliar terrain for him when she starts adding a woman's touch to his bachelor pad. As the three cowboys get together to sort yearlings for a friend, they devise a plan for making BBQ sauce to expand their cooking skills and company.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S3 E2 There's No Place Like Home Booger and Cody team up to pen a herd of cattle, but a stubborn cow takes refuge in a fishing hole, requiring some creative wrangling. The stress of maintaining a long-distance relationship leads Bubba and Kaley to move back to Alabama for good. Booger embraces his new role as a family man and enlists young Matthew to help surprise Jaclyn with a much needed home-improvement project. Cody helps Misty throw a beef-tasting party for potential buyers. As the guys ponder using their cowboy skills to open a steak house, they decide to get some on-the-job training by working a shift during the hectic dinner rush at a local eatery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S3 E6 Baranca A Mexican bandit named Baranca and his gang ride into North Fork looking for Bro Hadley, who murdered a Mexican farmer and burned down his home. Baranca finds Hadley and intends to get justice by executing him. However, Lucas intervenes just in time.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S3 E7 The Martinet Cavalry Captain Josiah Perry, a disciplined military man, learns his son, Lon, died in a North Fork gunfight with Lucas. Perry is bent on making Lucas pay for Lon's death. Perry's other son, Ben, tries to keep his dad from facing the same fate.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S1 E20 Go for Broke O'Rourke finds himself in a crisis when the F Troop pension fund is lost in a crooked high-stakes poker game. Wrangler Jane's cousin, a skilled poker player, develops a plan to help Captain Parmenter win back the money.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S1 E21 The New I.G Army Major Chester Winster arrives at Fort Courage and makes it known to the F Troop that he intends to wipe out the Hekawi Tribe. This causes a huge concern for O'Rourke and Agarn as their relationship with the tribe has been a peaceful one.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S1 E6 Bass Reeves: Trailblazing Lawman After escaping the bonds of slavery, Bass Reeves takes refuge among the indigenous people of The Indian Territory, where he is welcomed into their culture. When the Civil War ends, his new-found tracking skills and fluency in native languages lead to his appointment as the first Black Deputy U.S. Marshal west of the Mississippi River. Though he faces discrimination from his peers, Reeves earns their respect when he accepts Judge Isaac Parker's daunting order to hunt down one of the most ruthless killers in The Indian Territory and bring him back dead or alive. Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Judge Parker to learn more about the amazing career of Bass Reeves, who goes on to arrest 3,000 felons, kill 14 men in self-defense, and complete 32 years of service without being wounded.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S1 E7 Wild Bill Hickok & the First Quick-Draw Duel Wild Bill Hickok and his buddy, Davis Tutt, see their friendship fall apart over gambling debts and the affections of a beautiful woman. After Tutt swipes Wild Bill's prized timepiece as payback for a disputed debt, things begin to heat up. Then, when Tutt parades through town with the watch in one hand and Hickok's former girlfriend in the other, Wild Bill's blood begins to boil. Tutt refuses to return the watch, and he continues to flaunt the beautiful woman on his arm. The two men meet in the middle of town to settle their differences once and for all in what will become the very first quick-draw duel of the Old West. Both men reach for their pistols at the same time and fire! In an attempt to separate the truth from the fiction, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews George Ward Nichols, the journalist who immortalized the duel and created the legend of Wild Bill Hickok.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S1 E2 The Spirit of Truth After his fur trapping expedition is surprised by a Crow war party, legendary mountain man Jim Bridger suddenly finds himself in a desperate struggle to rescue his fellow trappers when one of them goes missing, and another is on the brink of madness.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S1 E3 The Fossil Feud When bloodthirsty Canadian trappers try to kill him, mountain man Jim Bridger takes cover in an unexplored valley. There, he runs headlong into a family of escaped slaves who show him the huge footprints and fossilized bones of long-dead monsters.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross
programme.desc: A dispute over expenses after an adoption doesn't go through as planned.

programme.title: Mathis Court With Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A man sues because a gamer badmouthed his gaming tournament on social media, causing him to lose business.

programme.title: Mathis Court With Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A dispute between a former couple over the cost of a spa date and a ruined hairstyle.

programme.title: Justice for the People With Judge Milian
programme.desc: A contractor is blamed for unexpected hotel expenses; an engagement ring loses value after a recorded phone call catches a roommate cheating.

programme.title: Justice for the People With Judge Milian
programme.desc: A teacher says one of her students' parents falsely accused her of shoplifting, leading to a false arrest and damaging her reputation.

programme.title: Justice for All With Judge Cristina Pérez
programme.desc: A man is injured while retrieving belongings from a house where he partied the night before; a sandwich shop owner blames a business partner for an incorrect radio ad.

programme.title: Justice for All With Judge Cristina Pérez
programme.desc: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for misuse of money he gave her for a medical procedure; parents argue over who is to blame for bounce-house damage.

programme.desc: A contractor takes a couple to court for not paying him what he's owed and keeping his tools, preventing him from working.

programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend after he quit his job and stuck her with the bills.

programme.desc: A man takes his aunt's ex-boyfriend to court for sailing away with the cruise tickets he bought for his aunt's birthday.

programme.title: The Call of the Wild
programme.desc: (2020) Touching adventure with Harrison Ford, based on Jack London's classic novel. A big, friendly hound finds himself unwittingly travelling across late 19th-century North America.

programme.title: Monkey Business
programme.desc: (1952) Screwball comedy starring Cary Grant as a scientist who drinks the elixir of youth and starts acting the fool, as does his strait-laced wife (Ginger Rogers).

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: (2022) Family comedy with Michael Peña. A young lad discovers that his slacker dad is a superhero. And before he's got used to the idea, he must foil a villain's plot to bring his dad down.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: (1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

programme.title: The Frighteners
programme.desc: (1996) Peter Jackson's comedy horror stars Michael J Fox as a psychic investigator in a town that has more ghouls and ghosties than you can shake a spirit stick at. But is he a fraud?

programme.title: Boss Level
programme.desc: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Major and the Minor

programme.desc: A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1980s - from football to wrestling and double decker bus racing to boxing - that includes many iconic moments.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore introduces highlights from September 1977 featuring QPR v Manchester City, Crystal Palace v Sheffield United, and Wolverhampton Wanderers v West Bromwich Albion. S7 Ep5

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents highlights from September 1977 as West Ham United take on Everton, Newcastle United face Coventry City, and Norwich City pit themselves against Arsenal. S7 Ep6

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Ms Jones: Classic US action drama series. The ever-chivalrous Thomas steps in to help a distraught civil servant search for her husband who has vanished in mysterious circumstances. S5 Ep15

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: On the Edge: Classic US detective drama. An ageing detective with a troubled home life is obsessed with cracking a high-profile case, but Theo fears that his fixation will cost him. S3 Ep17

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Big Game Hunt: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry arranges for a secret society to hold a meeting at Woodcote Park, and Ken is asked to follow and watch a client's wife. S4 Ep10

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Tomorrow Man: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan is assigned to ensure the safe shipment of a gold bullion consignment threatened by the plans of a brilliant computer expert. S3 Ep4

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Tequila Sunrise: Classic detective series. Extortion and blackmail lead to a man being murdered, an old friend of Makepeace's being badly injured, and Makepeace taking Dempsey home. S2 Ep5

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: The Man from Marseilles: Classic US action drama series. Thomas teams up with a Frenchman who is claiming to be the world-famous detective profiled in Robin's latest book. S5 Ep16

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A Wind from Corsica: Classic US detective drama. A convict uses a medical experiment as a chance to escape to New York, but he does not realise that he is carrying a deadly virus. S3 Ep18

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Barbour Jackets and Fire Extinguishers: Discover how an innovative fire extinguisher is saving lives, then see the care and attention that goes into making a Barbour waxed jacket. S1 Ep7

programme.title: European Qualifier: Ukraine v England
programme.desc: Katie Shanahan presents coverage as England's Lionesses get their qualifying campaign for the FIFA Women's World Cup in Brazil in 2027 under way against Ukraine.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Russian Killer: Extreme fisherman Jeremy heads to Russia's remote Amur river to investigate the mysterious deaths of three men and their links to a reclusive freshwater giant. S4 Ep7

programme.title: New: More Than Machine
programme.desc: Documentary series following members of the M-Sport World Rally Championship team as they face the trials and tribulations of competing in rally driving at the highest level. S2 Ep5

programme.title: New: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Killer Pass: Nail-biting documentary series. Heavy haul veterans Jack Jessee and Carey Hill make time for practical jokes while taking two multi-purpose storage tanks to Deadhorse. S3 Ep8

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Ricochet, Chris Jericho, Kris Statlander, Darby Allin and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: The Alien: Classic comedy-drama series set in Germany. When the boys have problems with a hard-drinking troublemaker, Neville comes up with an ingenious solution to get rid of him. S1 Ep9

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Rocky Eight and a Half: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue. Arthur uses all his persuasive powers to cajole Terry into donning his boxing gloves once more. S4 Ep1

programme.title: Shardlake
programme.desc: The concluding part of the compelling whodunnit series. Shardlake faces a stark choice after uncovering the history behind the murder weapon and the true owner of the sword. S1 Ep4

programme.title: The Best of the 70s
programme.desc: A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1970s - from horse racing to table football and Formula One to darts - that includes many memorable moments.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents footballing action from October 1977 featuring Leyton Orient v Tottenham Hotspur at Brisbane Road, Sunderland v Brighton, and Ipswich Town v Newcastle United. S7 Ep7

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore hosts highlights from October 1977 as Queens Park Rangers take on Everton, Stoke City face Crystal Palace, and Liverpool play Chelsea at Anfield. S7 Ep8

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: The Man from Marseilles: Classic US action drama series. Thomas teams up with a Frenchman who is claiming to be the world-famous detective profiled in Robin's latest book. S5 Ep16

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A Wind from Corsica: Classic US detective drama. A convict uses a medical experiment as a chance to escape to New York, but he does not realise that he is carrying a deadly virus. S3 Ep18

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Don't Buy from Me Argentina: Classic drama. Ken finds himself investigating an insurance swindle involving an Argentine polo team, and Rocky is put in charge of a valuable painting. S4 Ep11

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Taste of Fear: New recruit Bob Hargreaves joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers. But Regan has doubts about the newcomer's attitude. S3 Ep5

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Blood Money: Classic detective series. The duo probe the connections between a murdered antiques dealer and an Arab embassy official with diplomatic immunity after a robbery. S2 Ep6

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Torah! Torah! Torah!: Classic US action drama series. Thomas probes the theft of a rare edition of the Jewish holy book the Torah and is aided by a policewoman chasing smugglers. S5 Ep17

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Bad Dude: Classic US detective drama. A private detective sets himself up as a potential target for a hired killer and does not take kindly to Theo's attempts to rescue him. S3 Ep19

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: All in a Day's Pork: Classic drama. While Ken is hired to find out who has been taking Dictaphone tapes from a meat company, he also uncovers a plot to import pornographic material. S4 Ep12

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Bad Apple: When a convicted criminal grasses up a group of CID officers involved in bribery, Regan and Carter go undercover to investigate the corruption charges against them. S3 Ep6

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: High Drains Pilferer: Drama series about the shady dealings of a rogue. Terry has the misfortune to be driving for mobster Micky the Fish when his mistress's jewellery is stolen. S4 Ep3

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Pack of Teeth: Adventurer and extreme fisherman Jeremy Wade journeys into the swamps of southern Africa to investigate stories of a piranha-like fish that hunts in packs. S4 Ep1

programme.title: Copa del Rey: La Real v Lehoiak
programme.desc: Coverage of 2025-26 Copa del Rey semi-final second-leg action as Real Sociedad play host to Athletic Club in a Basque derby for a place in the Spanish Cup final.

programme.title: Live and Let Die
programme.desc: Bond film starring Roger Moore and Jane Seymour, 1973. 007 is sent to New York to investigate a prime minister, a Harlem crime kingpin, and the death of three MI6 agents.
